title: phaseolus vulgaris var. castaneus
intro: Phaseolus vulgaris var. castaneus, also known as the chestnut kidney bean or Castanea bean, is a variety of common bean that belongs to the family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phaseolus vulgaris var. castaneus include reducing the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease, diabetes, and certain types of cancer, as well as improving digestion and immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
